creator: marcel.e.peters@outlook.com
text:
Chapter 11.3.3. ( https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/wine/ )
Says that 32bit applications should run under the 32bit compatibility version w/ wine and would be installed by:

```# pkg install i386-wine```
However, this pkg is not available through pkg.
on the other hand /usr/ports/emulator/i386-wine is which is mentioned as an alternative.
